test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sort_lc ( lc_col LowCardinality(String), uint_col UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO sort_lc SELECT toString(rand() % 1000) AS lc_col, rand64() AS uint_col FROM numbers(2000000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sort_lc ORDER BY lc_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_lc ORDER BY lc_col, uint_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_lc ORDER BY uint_col, lc_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
